logo.description: Monocubed blue 3D cube icon + 'Monocubed' dark text inside a white semi-circle badge that clips at the bottom-right corner. Badge extends slightly beyond canvas edge. White background with very subtle shadow on curved edge. Present in 100% of reference images.

iconZone.position: upper-center, overlapping text and visual boundaries

content: Monocubed logo in white semi-circle badge

typeA-standard.description: Single person at desk on right, text on left, optional floating icons between them

typeB-multiPerson.description: Multiple people in office/meeting setting, text on left, presentation/infographic visible

typeC-stepList.description: Text + numbered step list on left, person in circular light-blue frame center, floating screenshots on right

logoPlacement.badgeShape: white semi-circle clipping at canvas corner

visualStyle.imageStyle: realistic photography of professionals in modern office/workspace settings

personRules.subject: professional person at desk with laptop/monitor
personRules.gender: both men and women, predominantly men (~73%)
personRules.facingDirection: facing LEFT toward text area (most common) or slightly toward camera
personRules.posture: seated at desk (most common), sometimes standing
personRules.attire: business casual — button-down shirts, blazers, polos
personRules.equipment: laptop always present, optional external monitor (~27%)

screenContent.description: Laptop/monitor screens MUST show topic-relevant content

examples.ecommerce: product listing pages, online store fronts, shopping carts

floatingIcons.primaryStyle: topic icon inside white circle with blue (#2B7DE9) border, 50-70px diameter
floatingIcons.position: upper-center of canvas, between text and person
floatingIcons.curvedArrow: ~36% of images include a small curved arrow from text area toward the icon
floatingIcons.arrowStyle: thin black curved line with small arrowhead, hand-drawn feel
arrangements: dual icons (two stacked or side by side)
arc cluster (4-6 icons in curved arc above person)
hexagonal grid (5-6 icons in honeycomb pattern)
scattered (2-3 floating elements at different depths)

numberedStepList.numberStyle: small blue (#2B7DE9) circles with white number, 20-24px diameter
numberedStepList.connectedLine: thin vertical blue line connecting numbered circles

backgroundStyle.leftSide: lighter/washed-out for text readability — natural bright area or faded to white
backgroundStyle.rightSide: person at desk with detailed environment

visualStyle.overlayElements: blue-outlined circular icons, wireframe illustrations, floating screenshots
visualStyle.backgroundTexture: realistic office photography — clean white or light with office environment on right
visualStyle.iconStyle: blue (#2B7DE9) outlined icons in white circles, sometimes with curved arrows

web-development.screenContent: code editor or website builder interface

portal-development.screenContent: portal dashboard with analytics and metrics

insurance.screenContent: insurance portal with stats and claim data

cost-pricing.screenContent: analytics dashboard with charts and financial data

outsourcing.screenContent: ecommerce site + video call with remote team on second screen

floatingIcons: relevant topic icon in blue circle
